final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: fine-art-illustration
Asset type: abstract expressionist painting, gallery-ready artwork
Primary request: bold abstract expressionist composition with clashing colors, fluid gestural brushstrokes, no figurative imagery, full of raw emotion and kinetic energy
Scene/backdrop: no defined scene; pure abstract field of paint
Subject: non-representational forms — swirling, dripping, and slashing brushwork layered across the canvas
Style/medium: abstract expressionism, oil painting aesthetic, gestural impasto texture
Composition/framing: full-bleed canvas, dynamic diagonal energy flows, no focal center, all-over composition
Lighting/mood: no external light source; mood conveyed through color tension — intense, visceral, emotionally charged
Color palette: clashing saturated hues — deep crimson, electric cobalt, burnt sienna, acid yellow, near-black — with raw unpainted gaps
Materials/textures: thick impasto ridges, visible palette-knife scrapes, drips and splatter, layered paint buildup
Constraints: no recognizable figures, faces, objects, or text; keep the composition non-representational throughout
Avoid: decorative prettiness, pastel softness, symmetrical balance, digital-clean edges, watermark
